title: Last Nite
why_this_song: Last Nite by The Strokes (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "And see, people, they don't understand"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: ""Oh, baby, I feel so down""
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Oh, baby, don't care no more"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: ""Oh, baby, I feel so down""
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Last night she said"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "understand" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "understand" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feel" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: And me, I ain't ever gonna understand

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Last Nite" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Last Nite" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Last Nite" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Last Nite"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Strokes one question about "Last Nite", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Strokes sobre "Last Nite", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
